title: Convert units (US customary)
description: Convert between US customary measures of distance, volume, and mass.
topic_path: Get ready for ratios, rates, and percentages

assessment_items.question_content:
**Convert.** 

$112$ ounces $=$ [[☃ input-number 1]] pounds

[[☃ explanation 1]]

options.explanation:
Conversions| | | |||
- | | | |
$1$ mile $= 5{,}280$ feet| | $1$ minute $= 60$ seconds|| $1$ cup $= 8$ fluid ounces|
$1$ mile $= 1{,}760$ yards| |$1$ hour $= 60$ minutes|| $1$ pint $= 2$ cups|
$1$ yard $= 3$ feet||$1$ pound $= 16$ ounces ||$1$ quart $= 2$ pints|
$1$ foot $= 12$ inches||$1$ ton $= 2{,}000$ pounds || $1$ gallon $= 4$ quarts|

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the table to show equivalent measurements in ounces and pounds.**

Ounces | Pounds
:-: | :-:
$16$ |  $1$
[[☃ input-number 3]] | $5$
$144$| [[☃ input-number 4]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]
hints:
First, let's see how many ounces are in $\maroonD5$ pounds.  

$\maroonD{5}  \text{ pounds}= \maroonD{5}\times\greenD{16}=\maroonD{80}\text{ ounces}$

Here is the completed table:

Ounces| Pounds 
:-: | :-:
$16$ |  $1$
$\maroonD{80}$ | $5$
$144$ | $\blueD9$

options.explanation:
Conversions| | | |||
- | | | |
$1$ mile $= 5{,}280$ feet| | $1$ minute $= 60$ seconds|| $1$ cup $= 8$ fluid ounces|
$1$ mile $= 1{,}760$ yards| |$1$ hour $= 60$ minutes|| $1$ pint $= 2$ cups|
$1$ yard $= 3$ feet||$1$ pound $= 16$ ounces ||$1$ quart $= 2$ pints|
$1$ foot $= 12$ inches||$1$ ton $= 2{,}000$ pounds || $1$ gallon $= 4$ quarts|

Now, we can compare.
